meta.title: Nombres et âge
meta.description: Basic numbers, age, dates, and prices in French.
meta.description_ko: 프랑스어 기초 숫자, 나이, 날짜, 가격 표현.

explanation.en: "Un" means "one".

questions.prompt: Que signifie « un » ? (What does "un" mean?)

explanation.en: "Dix" means "ten".

questions.prompt: Que signifie « dix » ? (What does "dix" mean?)

explanation.en: "Quel âge avez-vous ?" means "How old are you?" (formal).
explanation.ko: 「Quel âge avez-vous ?」는 격식체로 나이를 묻는 표현이다.

questions.prompt: « Quel âge avez-vous ? » signifie quoi ? (What does this phrase mean?)

explanation.en: "Vingt" means "twenty".

questions.prompt: Comment dit-on « vingt » en anglais ? (How do you say "vingt" in English?)

explanation.en: In French, age is expressed with "avoir" (to have): "J'ai vingt ans" = "I am twenty years old" (literally "I have twenty years").
explanation.ko: 프랑스어에서 나이는 avoir(가지다) 동사로 표현하며 'J'ai vingt ans'는 '저는 20살입니다'(직역: 20년을 가지다)라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: « J'ai vingt ans » signifie quoi ? (What does this mean?)

explanation.en: Age in French uses the verb "avoir" (to have), not "être" (to be).

questions.prompt: Quel âge ___-vous ? (How old are you?)

explanation.en: "J'ai" (I have) + number + "ans" is the standard way to state age.

questions.prompt: J'___ vingt-cinq ans. (I am twenty-five years old.)

explanation.en: "Semaine" means "week".

questions.prompt: Il y a sept jours dans une ___. (There are seven days in a week.)

explanation.en: "Famille" means "family".

questions.prompt: Combien de personnes y a-t-il dans votre ___? (How many people are in your family?)

explanation.en: "Chiffres" means "digits/numbers", used for things like phone numbers.

questions.prompt: Mon numéro de téléphone est le zéro-six... (My phone number is zero-six...) — this uses which word for numbers?

explanation.en: "Euros" is the currency used in France.

questions.prompt: Ce livre coûte trente ___. (This book costs thirty euros.)

explanation.en: "Mars" means "March".

questions.prompt: Mon anniversaire est le dix ___. (My birthday is March 10th.)

explanation.en: "Cent dix" means "one hundred ten".

questions.prompt: Ce sac coûte cent ___ euros. (This bag costs one hundred ten euros.)

explanation.en: "Et" (and) connects the last item in a list.

questions.prompt: Ma famille compte quatre personnes : mon père, ma mère, mon frère ___ moi. (My family has four people: my father, mother, brother, and me.)

explanation.en: "S'il vous plaît" politely completes the request.

questions.prompt: Quel est votre numéro de téléphone ___ ? (What is your phone number?)

explanation.en: "Et quart" means "a quarter past" the hour.

questions.prompt: Il est trois heures ___ quart. (It is a quarter past three.)

explanation.en: "Dix-huit" means "eighteen".

questions.prompt: Ma sœur a dix-___ ans, elle est encore étudiante. (My sister is eighteen years old, she's still a student.)

explanation.en: "Décembre" means "December", completing the date.

questions.prompt: Nous sommes le vingt-cinq ___. (Today is the twenty-fifth.)

explanation.en: "Cent" (hundred) does not take an -s in this context because it is directly followed by another number in some cases, but before "euros" alone (deux cents) it does take -s: "deux cents euros".
explanation.ko: 'cent'은 뒤에 다른 숫자가 바로 오지 않고 명사(euros)로 끝날 때는 -s가 붙어 'deux cents euros'가 된다.

questions.prompt: Cette montre coûte deux ___ euros. (This watch costs two hundred euros.)

explanation.en: "Mois" means "months".

questions.prompt: Il y a douze ___ dans une année. (There are twelve months in a year.)

explanation.en: Age in French must use "avoir" (to have), not "être" (to be): "avez-vous" (not "êtes-vous").
explanation.ko: 프랑스어에서 나이는 'être'가 아니라 'avoir'를 써야 하므로 'avez-vous'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: Quel âge êtes-vous ? (How old are you?) — find the error

explanation.en: The word "ans" (years) must be included after the number when stating age: "vingt-cinq ans" (not just "vingt-cinq").
explanation.ko: 나이를 말할 때는 숫자 뒤에 'ans(년)'을 반드시 포함해야 하므로 'vingt-cinq ans'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: J'ai vingt-cinq. (I am twenty-five years old.) — find the error

explanation.en: In French dates, the day comes before the month: "le dix mars" (not "mars le dix").
explanation.ko: 프랑스어 날짜 표현에서는 날짜가 월 앞에 와야 하므로 'le dix mars'가 맞다.

questions.prompt: Ma famille compte quatre personnes. (My family has four people.) — this is correct, use another: Mon anniversaire est mars le dix. (My birthday is March 10th.) — find the error
choices: Mon anniversaire est le dix mars.
Mon anniversaire est mars le dix.
Mon anniversaire le dix est mars.
Mon anniversaire est dix le mars.

explanation.en: The sentence reads: J'ai vingt-cinq ans ("I am twenty-five years old").

questions.prompt: __________ vingt-cinq ans. (I am twenty-five years old.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: Mon anniversaire est le dix mars ("My birthday is March 10th").
explanation.ko: 문장은 'Mon anniversaire est le dix mars' (제 생일은 3월 10일입니다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: Mon anniversaire est __________. (My birthday is March 10th.)
